questionHtml:
The graph shows human body temperature variation in a daily rhythm of 24 hours.

 

Which hormone controls this variation?

A.  Leptin

B.  Insulin

C.  Glucagon

D.  Thyroxin

meta.title: The graph shows human body temperature variation in a daily rhythm of 24 hours. Which hormone controls this variation? A. Leptin B. Insulin C. Glucagon D. Thyroxin
